cpi-yoy.name: CPI YoY / 居民消费价格指数 同比
cpi-yoy._notes: Index = 100 + YoY%. Subtract 100 for signed YoY delta.

core-cpi.name: Core CPI YoY / 不包括食品和能源 CPI 同比
core-cpi._notes: Same as cpi-yoy but excluding food & energy basket.

ppi-yoy.name: PPI YoY / 工业生产者出厂价格指数 同比

gdp-yoy.name: GDP YoY / 国内生产总值指数 (上年同期=100) 当季值

industrial-yoy.name: Industrial Production YoY / 规上工业增加值 当月同比

retail-yoy.name: Retail Sales YoY / 社会消费品零售总额 同比增长

fai-yoy.name: FAI YoY (cumulative) / 固定资产投资额 累计增长
fai-yoy._notes: NBS publishes FAI as cumulative YTD YoY only — no single-month read.

exports-yoy.name: Exports YoY USD / 出口总值 同比

imports-yoy.name: Imports YoY USD / 进口总值 同比

trade-balance.name: Trade Balance USD / 进出口差额当期值 (千美元)
trade-balance._notes: Raw value in thousand USD. Divide by 1000 for 亿美元 (common in Chinese news).

urban-unemployment.name: Urban Surveyed Unemployment / 全国城镇调查失业率

pmi-manufacturing.name: Mfg PMI (official NBS) / 制造业采购经理指数

pmi-non-manufacturing.name: Non-Mfg PMI (official NBS) / 非制造业商务活动指数

pmi-composite.name: Composite PMI Output / 综合PMI产出指数

m2-yoy.name: M2 YoY / 广义货币 同比增长

m1-yoy.name: M1 YoY / 狭义货币 同比增长

realestate-investment-yoy.name: Real Estate Investment YoY (cumulative) / 房地产投资 累计增长

housing-sales-area-yoy.name: Residential Sales Floor Area YoY (cumulative) / 商品住宅销售面积 累计增长

housing-sales-value-yoy.name: Residential Sales Value YoY (cumulative) / 商品住宅销售额 累计增长

realestate-funding-yoy.name: Real Estate Funding YoY (cumulative) / 房地产投资本年资金来源 累计增长

services-production-yoy.name: Services Production Index YoY / 服务业生产指数 当月同比

lpr-1y.name: Loan Prime Rate 1Y / 贷款市场报价利率 1年期

lpr-5y.name: Loan Prime Rate 5Y / 贷款市场报价利率 5年期

rrr-major.name: RRR Major Banks / 大型金融机构 存款准备金率

shibor-3m.name: SHIBOR 3-Month / 上海银行间同业拆放利率 3个月

shrzgm.name: Aggregate Financing / 社会融资规模增量

new-loans.name: New RMB Loans / 人民币贷款增量

caixin-mfg-pmi.name: Caixin Manufacturing PMI / 财新制造业 PMI

caixin-svc-pmi.name: Caixin Services PMI / 财新服务业 PMI

TRESEGCNM052N._warning: FRED series TRESEGCNM052N has publication lag — latest value may be 1-4 weeks behind real-world data depending on release schedule.

_provenance.source_authority: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis

DEXCHUS._warning: FRED series DEXCHUS has publication lag — latest value may be 1-4 weeks behind real-world data depending on release schedule.

_provenance.source_authority: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
